mapper.select: select r.id,u.username,u.avatar_url from relation r inner join user u on r.focus_user_id = u.id where r.user_id=#{userId}
select r.id,u.username,u.avatar_url from relation r inner join user u on r.user_id = u.id where r.focus_user_id=#{id}
select r.id,u.username,u.avatar_url from relation r inner join user u on r.user_id = u.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
